summary: Phase 2-4 Implementation Testing (Iteration 156) - PASSED. All onboarding, dashboard UX, growth features verified: (1) Landing page prompt templates link to /signup?prompt=... correctly; (2) Signup captures prompt param and stores in localStorage; (3) Story Video Studio has all input elements including welcome overlay support; (4) Dashboard hero card 'Create Story Video' with indigo gradient at top, 'More Creator Tools' label below; (5) Gallery page public at /gallery shows 12 real videos with title/style/timing; (6) Done phase has all share features: 'Your AI video is ready!', Download Video, Copy Link, social sharing buttons (X, Facebook, WhatsApp, LinkedIn). No regressions in Reel Generator access.

issues: Cookie consent banner overlays bottom UI elements - minor visual issue, doesn't block functionality

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user and gallery data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2-4 features fully implemented and tested. Onboarding flow uses localStorage key 'onboarding_prompt'. Dashboard hero card links to /app/story-video-studio. Gallery page is PUBLIC at /gallery. Share/done phase has all social buttons with data-testids.
